Video.summary: Time for another frog food today we’re gonna turn my Dog Bowie into an anime character with a pop punk style. From inspo to highlights we got it covered. So sit back, relax, and enjoy!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character
Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character

Video.summary: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!
Video.title: Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 2

Image.alt: Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 2
Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 2
Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 2
